form.label: Anchore Security Vulnerability Dashboard
form.description: Real-time security monitoring dashboard for Anchore vulnerability data. Designed for immediate threat detection and response by security teams.

search.query: | tstats latest(_time) as lastTime where sourcetype="anchore:vulnerabilities" by index | sort -lastTime | head 1 | fields index

index="$selected_index$" sourcetype="anchore:vulnerabilities" | eval severity_priority = case( severity="Critical", 1, severity="High", 2, severity="Medium", 3, severity="Low", 4, 1=1, 5 ) | eval alert_level = case( severity="Critical", "critical", severity="High", "high", severity="Medium", "medium", 1=1, "low" ) | eval repo_display = if(isnotnull(repo), repo, "Unknown Repository") | eval registry_display = if(isnotnull(registry), registry, "Unknown Registry") | eval vuln_display = if(isnotnull(vuln_id), vuln_id, "No CVE") | eval package_display = if(isnotnull(package_name), package_name, package) | search ($repository_filter$) ($severity_filter$) ($registry_filter$) ($account_filter$) | fields *

| stats count(eval(severity="Critical")) as critical_vulns, count(eval(severity="High")) as high_vulns, count(eval(vulnerability_found=false)) as clean_images, count as total_events | eval alert_status = case( critical_vulns > 0, "critical", high_vulns > 5, "warning", 1=1, "normal" ) | table alert_status, critical_vulns, high_vulns, clean_images, total_events
| tstats count where sourcetype="anchore:vulnerabilities" by index | fields index
index="$selected_index$" sourcetype="anchore:vulnerabilities" | dedup account_name | sort 0 account_name | table account_name
index="$selected_index$" sourcetype="anchore:vulnerabilities" ($account_filter$) | dedup registry | sort 0 registry | table registry
index="$selected_index$" sourcetype="anchore:vulnerabilities" ($account_filter$) ($registry_filter$) | dedup repo | sort 0 repo | table repo

div.style: background-color: #dc3545; color: white; padding: 15px; margin: 10px 0; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;

html.div: 🚨 CRITICAL: Critical vulnerabilities detected - Immediate security response required!

div.style: background-color: #ffc107; color: #212529; padding: 15px; margin: 10px 0; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;

html.div: ⚠️ WARNING: High severity vulnerabilities detected - Review and remediate

div.style: background-color: #28a745; color: white; padding: 15px; margin: 10px 0; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;

html.div: ✅ Security posture is good - No critical vulnerabilities detected

search.query: | search severity="Critical" | stats count
| search severity="High" | stats count
| search vulnerability_found=true | stats count
| search vulnerability_found=true | stats dc(image_digest) as vulnerable_images
| search vulnerability_found=false | stats dc(image_digest) as clean_images

| stats count(eval(vulnerability_found=false)) as clean, count(eval(vulnerability_found=true)) as vulnerable | eval total = clean + vulnerable | eval security_score = if(total > 0, round((clean / total) * 100, 1), 100) | table security_score

| search severity IN ("Critical", "High") | eval Priority = case( severity="Critical", "🔴 CRITICAL", severity="High", "🟠 HIGH", 1=1, "⚪ " + severity ) | eval Image = repo_display + ":" + if(isnotnull(tag), tag, "latest") | eval Vulnerability = vuln_display | eval Package = package_display + if(isnotnull(package_version), " (" + package_version + ")", "") | eval Fix = if(isnotnull(fix) AND fix!="", fix, "No fix available") | eval Registry = registry_display | sort severity_priority, vuln_id | head 50 | table Priority, Image, Vulnerability, Package, Fix, Registry, account_name
| search vulnerability_found=true | stats count by severity | sort severity_priority
| search vulnerability_found=true | stats count by repo_display | sort -count | head 10 | rename repo_display as Repository, count as "Vulnerability Count"
| search vulnerability_found=true | timechart span=1h count by severity

| search vulnerability_found=true | stats count as vuln_count, dc(vuln_id) as unique_cves, values(severity) as severities by package_display | sort -vuln_count | head 20 | rename package_display as "Package Name", vuln_count as "Total Vulnerabilities", unique_cves as "Unique CVEs", severities as "Severity Levels"

| stats count(eval(vulnerability_found=true)) as vulnerable_images, count(eval(vulnerability_found=false)) as clean_images, count(eval(severity="Critical")) as critical_vulns, count(eval(severity="High")) as high_vulns by registry_display | eval total_images = vulnerable_images + clean_images | eval security_score = if(total_images > 0, round((clean_images / total_images) * 100, 1), 100) | sort -critical_vulns, -high_vulns | rename registry_display as "Registry", vulnerable_images as "Vulnerable Images", clean_images as "Clean Images", critical_vulns as "Critical", high_vulns as "High", security_score as "Security Score %"

| eval scan_time = strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval Image = repo_display + ":" + if(isnotnull(tag), tag, "latest") | eval Status = if(vulnerability_found=true, case( severity="Critical", "🔴 Critical Found", severity="High", "🟠 High Risk", severity="Medium", "🟡 Medium Risk", 1=1, "🔵 Low Risk" ), "✅ Clean") | eval Account = account_name | eval API_Source = api_url | sort -_time | head 100 | table scan_time, Image, Status, Account, API_Source, vulnerability_count | rename scan_time as "Scan Time", vulnerability_count as "Vuln Count"
